summary: PowerShell script is well-structured (Set-StrictMode, proper error handling, modular functions), but workflow is incomplete and non-functional: (1) workflow assumes ./fixtures exists—never creates or provides test data; (2) no steps to set up fixtures or verify the path; (3) no output to GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY; (4) no Pester tests or sample fixture files delivered (required by task); (5) workflow would fail immediately on act because ./fixtures is missing. Script logic is sound but orphaned without fixtures. Task requirements for Pester tests, fixture creation, act validation, and act-result.txt artifact are entirely unaddressed.
